new_value: Added upper-layer UDP/ICMPv6 malformed packet validation to ble_ingress validate_ipv6_packet and extended test_rejects_malformed_ipv6. Cross-impl drops now match reference impls for short headers, bad lengths. Updated tests in lichen/tests/ble_ingress. Native_sim/Twister compatible. No crashes/leaks observed.
